heroBadge: Public Beta · All features free during testing
heroSubtitle: Beautiful, privacy-first intimacy tracker. Map your moments, visualize patterns, and deepen your connection — without ever compromising your data.
statsPrivateDesc: Your data never leaves your device
statsSoldDesc: We make money, not from you
featuresSubtitle: Built from the ground up with your privacy as the foundation. Every feature is designed to enhance your relationship without compromising security.
featMapDesc: Pin every moment on a beautiful map. See heatmaps, clusters, and your journey across cities and countries.
featAnalyticsDesc: Discover patterns with elegant charts. Track frequency, mood trends, duration stats, and more.
featPrivacyDesc: E2E encryption, PIN protection, and zero-knowledge architecture. Even we can't see your data.
featSyncDesc: Seamlessly sync with your partner. Share moments together, keep individual privacy intact.
featTimelineDesc: Browse your history in a stunning timeline. Filter by date, location, mood, or duration.
featMoodDesc: Log how you felt each time. Understand the emotional patterns behind your connection.
stepsSubtitle: Four simple steps to start tracking your intimate journey securely and beautifully.
step1Desc: Sign up in seconds. Set a PIN code for instant privacy protection. No personal data required.
step2Desc: Pin locations on an interactive map, log mood and notes. Each entry is encrypted end-to-end.
step3Desc: View beautiful charts of frequency, mood trends, and patterns. Understand your relationship better.
step4Desc: Invite your partner to sync. Share moments together while keeping your individual privacy.
pricingBetaBanner: Beta Phase — Pro features are free for early adopters
pricingSubtitle: Per account, not per partner. Track with as many people as you want — we don't count.
pricingFreeDesc: Dip your toes in. Enough to get started.
pricingLifetimeDesc: Pay once, own it forever. No subscriptions.
pricingBottomTitle: Building in the open — your feedback matters
pricingBottomDesc: All Pro features are unlocked during beta. Early adopters receive a
footerDesc: A privacy-first intimacy tracker built by indie developer
voteDescription: Vote on upcoming features and improvements. Your feedback directly influences what we build next.
noActivePolls: No active polls at the moment. Check back soon!
